moments.title: England vs. Panama in World Cup
moments.blurb: England faces Panama in a crucial group stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026, aiming to secure their spot in the knockout rounds.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Big game energy! England takes on Panama in the World Cup this Saturday. Can the Three Lions roar into the next round? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's World Cup match day for England! Get behind the lads as they aim for victory against Panama. Where are you watching? #ThreeLions

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK is in full swing, with daily drama and new bombshells entering the football-themed villa.

angles.name: Current Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's giving you the most 'ick' and who's coupling up for real? #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: World Cup Crossover
angles.copy: It's a World Cup x Love Island summer! The villa is buzzing with football fever, even if the Islanders are more focused on finding love. Are you watching?

moments.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 Premiere
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's House Of The Dragon begins streaming today, continuing the Targaryen saga.

angles.name: New Season Drop
angles.copy: Fire and Blood returns! House Of The Dragon Season 3 is here. Who's ready to dive back into Westeros? #HouseOfTheDragon

angles.name: What to expect
angles.copy: Dragons, drama, and political intrigue – House Of The Dragon Season 3 promises to deliver. What are your predictions for the new season?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Continues
moments.blurb: Jeremy Clarkson's hit reality series, Clarkson's Farm, is releasing new episodes of its fifth season throughout June on Prime Video.

angles.name: Farm Life
angles.copy: More chaos at Diddly Squat! Clarkson's Farm Season 5 is still dropping new episodes this month. Are you keeping up with Jeremy and Kaleb?

angles.name: Kaleb's Adventures
angles.copy: Kaleb Cooper's first trip abroad is happening in Clarkson's Farm S5! What's your favourite Kaleb moment from the new series so far?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 Premiere
moments.blurb: The fifth and final season of the critically acclaimed series The Bear arrives on Disney+ this Friday, June 26.

angles.name: Final Season Hype
angles.copy: Chef! The final season of The Bear is almost here! Get ready for one last intense culinary ride on Disney+ this Friday. #TheBearFX

angles.name: What's Next for Carmy
angles.copy: It's the beginning of the end for Carmy and The Bear. What do you hope to see in this final season?

moments.title: The Cure & Lily Allen in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Cardiff is hosting a massive night of music on Wednesday, June 24, with The Cure playing Blackweir Fields and Lily Allen at Utilita Arena.

angles.name: Cardiff Music Scene
angles.copy: Huge night for Cardiff music fans this Wednesday! The Cure at Blackweir Fields and Lily Allen at Utilita Arena – the city is buzzing!

angles.name: The Cure Live
angles.copy: Legendary Goth-rockers The Cure are bringing their iconic sound to Cardiff's Blackweir Fields this Wednesday! Who's going? #TheCure

angles.name: Lily Allen Show
angles.copy: Lily Allen takes over Utilita Arena Cardiff this Wednesday! Expect a night of sharp wit and pop anthems. Are you ready?

moments.title: Powderham Castle Concerts: Teddy Swims, Alanis Morissette, Lewis Capaldi
moments.blurb: Powderham Castle in Exeter hosts a series of major concerts this week, including Teddy Swims (June 25), Alanis Morissette (June 26), and Lewis Capaldi (June 27-28).

angles.name: Exeter Gigs
angles.copy: Powderham Castle is the place to be this week! Teddy Swims, Alanis Morissette, and Lewis Capaldi are all playing. Which show are you seeing?

angles.name: Alanis in Devon
angles.copy: Jagged Little Pill legend Alanis Morissette brings her iconic sound to Powderham Castle, Exeter, this Thursday! Get ready to sing along.

angles.name: Capaldi at Powderham
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi live at Powderham Castle this weekend! Who's excited for two nights of incredible music in Exeter?

moments.title: Metallica at Principality Stadium
moments.blurb: Heavy metal titans Metallica are set to play Cardiff's Principality Stadium this Sunday, June 28, as part of their M72 World Tour.

angles.name: Metal in Wales
angles.copy: Cardiff, are you ready to be electrified? Metallica hits the Principality Stadium this Sunday! #Metallica

angles.name: World Tour
angles.copy: Metallica's M72 World Tour rolls into Cardiff this weekend! Two different setlists, no repeats. It's going to be epic.

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift holds the #1 spot with 'I Knew It, I Knew You', while Olivia Rodrigo has two top 5 hits with 'Stupid Song' and 'The Cure'.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The UK Official Singles Chart is in! Taylor Swift is still at #1. What's your favourite from this week's Top 40?

angles.name: Olivia Rodrigo
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo is dominating the charts with 'Stupid Song' at #2 and 'The Cure' at #3! Which one are you streaming most?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Today marks the 73rd birthday of the iconic pop singer and LGBTQ+ activist Cyndi Lauper.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still shining bright. What's your favourite Cyndi track? #CyndiLauper

angles.name: True Colours
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Cyndi Lauper on her 73rd birthday today! A true icon and activist.

moments.title: Kris Kristofferson Turns 90
moments.blurb: Legendary country and folk singer-songwriter Kris Kristofferson celebrates his 90th birthday today.

angles.name: Country Legend
angles.copy: Happy 90th Birthday to the legendary Kris Kristofferson! From 'Me and Bobby McGee' to 'Help Me Make It Through the Night', a true songwriting genius. #KrisKristofferson

angles.name: 90 Today
angles.copy: Celebrating 90 years of Kris Kristofferson! What's your favourite song penned or performed by the iconic musician and actor?

moments.title: Jason Mraz's 49th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz celebrates his 49th birthday on June 23.

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday to the 'I'm Yours' singer, Jason Mraz, tomorrow! Still bringing the good vibes. #JasonMraz

angles.name: Good Vibes
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate Jason Mraz turning 49! What's your favourite feel-good track from him?

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande this Thursday! Celebrate with your favourite track. #ArianaGrande

angles.name: Chart Success
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon star to global pop sensation, Ariana Grande turns 33 on Thursday! What's her best single?

moments.title: Curt Smith (Tears for Fears) Turns 65
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, co-founder and bassist of Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday on Tuesday, June 24.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Tears for Fears' Curt Smith tomorrow! Relive the 'Shout' and 'Everybody Wants To Rule The World' days. #TearsForFears

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 65th Birthday to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears, tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the iconic duo?

moments.title: Mick Jones (The Clash) Turns 71
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, co-founder and guitarist of punk legends The Clash, celebrates his 71st birthday on Thursday, June 26.

angles.name: Punk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to The Clash's Mick Jones this Thursday! A true punk rock icon. What's your favourite Clash anthem? #MickJones

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Mick Jones of The Clash, who turns 71 on Thursday! From 'London Calling' to 'Should I Stay or Should I Go', his influence is immense.

moments.title: Ashley Tisdale's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Ashley Tisdale, known for High School Musical and Phineas and Ferb, turns 41 on July 2.

angles.name: HSM Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ashley Tisdale, Sharpay Evans herself, turns 41 on July 2nd! What's your favourite High School Musical moment? #AshleyTisdale

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 41st Birthday to actress and singer Ashley Tisdale this Thursday!

moments.title: Debbie Harry (Blondie) Turns 81
moments.blurb: The iconic lead singer of Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie on July 1st! Still radiating cool. #DebbieHarry

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Debbie Harry, who turns 81 next week! What's your go-to Blondie track?

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the iconic Missy Elliott on July 1st! Get your freak on and celebrate a true music innovator. #MissyElliott

angles.name: Work It
angles.copy: From 'Get Ur Freak On' to 'Work It', Missy Elliott turns 55 next week! What's your favourite track from the trailblazing artist?
